_notes.commandValue: Left number on the promoted/variant counter. Usually 0 for an out-of-depth replacement.
_notes.moraleValue: Right number on the promoted/variant counter. Usually 1 for an out-of-depth replacement.
_notes.baseLeaderId: ID of the base leader record in leaders.json that this variant is derived from.

specialRules.activationCondition: Replaces Reno when Reno becomes a casualty (SM 2.1). All Burnside restrictions are lifted upon activation.
Replaces McClellan when McClellan becomes a casualty (SM 2.1). All Burnside restrictions are lifted upon activation.
